requirements.evidence: Passed `cd android && ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --tests 'com.laneshadow.ui.molecules.LSContentCardTest.default_render_uses_surface_card_tokens'` in this review session. `android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSContentCard.kt` composes through `LSCard` and resolves style from `LocalLaneShadowTheme.current` via `resolveLSContentCardStyle(theme)`.

Passed `cd android && ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --tests 'com.laneshadow.ui.molecules.LSContentCardTest.header_and_actions_slots_compose_correctly'` in this review session. `android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSContentCard.kt` conditionally renders slot sections with `header?.let` and `actions?.let`, so omitted slots do not reserve containers in the implementation.

Passed `cd android && ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --tests 'com.laneshadow.ui.molecules.LSListRowTest.row_with_avatar_subtitle_chevron_meets_token_spec'` in this review session. `android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSListRow.kt` uses `theme.sizing.touchTarget`, `theme.space.sm`, `theme.space.xs`, `TypographyVariant.Ui.Body.Md`, and `IconSize.Md`, with avatar and chevron composed through atoms.

`android/app/src/androidTest/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSListRowUiTest.kt` contains `tap_callback_fires_once_non_tap_row_has_no_indication`, and `android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSListRow.kt` now applies the caller modifier and click semantics to the same interactive root. `cd android && ./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=com.laneshadow.ui.molecules.LSListRowUiTest#tap_callback_fires_once_non_tap_row_has_no_indication` failed only with `No connected devices!`, so the remaining block is environmental rather than code correctness.

`grep -n 'Color(0xFF' android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSContentCard.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSListRow.kt | wc -l` returned `0`, and `grep -n 'Text(' ... | wc -l` returned `0` in this review session.

`grep -c 'molecules.contentcard\|molecules.listrow' android/app/src/debug/java/com/laneshadow/sandbox/stories/molecules/LSContentCardStory.kt android/app/src/debug/java/com/laneshadow/sandbox/stories/molecules/LSListRowStory.kt | awk -F: '{s+=$2} END {print s}'` returned `10` in this review session.

findings.evidence: `header_and_actions_slots_compose_correctly` now checks runtime composition order, but it does not directly assert the omitted-slot card's final height or spacing delta, so the 'no reserved gap when omitted' part of the regression proof is weaker than the rest of the suite.
findings.fix: Strengthen the test by comparing the no-slot variant's measured bounds against an equivalent baseline or by asserting the absence of extra vertical spacing after omission.

findings.evidence: The remediation report includes green-phase command results, but it does not include RED-phase evidence showing the required tests failing before the fix, so TDD compliance cannot be fully proven from the submitted artifacts alone.
findings.fix: Attach failing pre-fix test output or a referenced RED commit for each AC in future iteration reports.

summary: APPROVED on the current worktree state: AC-1 through AC-6 are satisfied, `./gradlew test` and `./gradlew assembleDebug` both passed in this review session, and the connected-device test is blocked only by the absence of a device/emulator. Residual concerns are limited to test-rigor/TDD-evidence quality, not merge-blocking correctness defects.
